name: github_remove_org_copilot_space_collaborator
description: Remove a collaborator from an organization Copilot Space (DELETE /orgs/{org}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/collaborators/{actor_type}/{actor_identifier}). Returns HTTP 204. See [Remove a collaborator from an organization Copilot Space](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/collaborators?api
